body_txt: Aww, look at sweet little Sally. So adorable, so innocent... wait, where's my wallet? This is when a little girl takes advantage of the perception that Children Are Innocent to play a bunch of adults for suckers. Sometimes this character will work in partnership with an adult, usually her father, but as often as not she's the real brains of the outfit. When she grows up, she'll probably become the Decoy Damsel , who uses her beauty to fool people in the same way Little Miss Con Artist uses her cuteness. Compare Deliberately Cute Child and Daddy's Little Villain . The Artful Dodger is the Spear Counterpart .
